summary: Iteration 2 backend fully validated. All 13 MCP tools registered; /api/mcp/manifest and /api/mcp/call work; calculator, wikipedia_search, fetch_url, create_note/list_notes/delete_note, and live get_weather (Open-Meteo) all integrated with Claude sonnet-4-5 via /api/chat. Suggestions array reliably populated. Iteration-1 regression (memories, conversations, recall) still green. Applied minor fix to wikipedia_search (added User-Agent header + used path-safe URL encoding). 66/66 backend tests passing.
passed_tests: GET /api/tools returns 13 tools incl. new ones; get_weather.mocked=false; web_search.mocked=true; category field present
GET /api/mcp/manifest returns protocol=mcp-like/1.0, server=nova, 13 tools with JSON input_schema
POST /api/mcp/call wikipedia_search returns extract (after UA fix)
POST /api/mcp/call get_weather returns live temperature_c, source=open-meteo (live)
POST /api/chat 'Calculate sqrt(144)*3' triggers calculator and reply mentions 36
POST /api/chat 'Who was Alan Turing?' triggers wikipedia_search; reply mentions Turing
POST /api/chat 'Weather in Nagpur' triggers get_weather (LIVE, no mock marker)
POST /api/chat 'Summarize https://example.com' triggers fetch_url with the URL
POST /api/chat 'Make a note: buy groceries tomorrow' creates note; /api/notes lists it; /api/notes/{id} deletes it
POST /api/chat 'show my notes' triggers list_notes and reply mentions groceries
Chat responses include non-null suggestions array (populated for calc & weather)
Iteration-1 flows still work: save_memory, recall, /api/memories CRUD, /api/conversations list/get/delete
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (minor fix: wikipedia_search — added User-Agent header and used quote() instead of quote_plus() for URL path)
action_item_for_main_agent: No action required. Note: web_search remains MOCKED (expected — awaiting Serper/Brave key). Minor fix applied to wikipedia_search tool (User-Agent header + path-safe URL encoding) — consider keeping this permanently as Wikipedia REST/API endpoints reject requests without a proper UA and the REST summary path requires %20 (not +) for spaces.
